genre_refs: Howard Chandler Christy 'Scene at the Signing of the Constitution of the United States' (1940 painting)
description: Reproduction of Howard Chandler Christy's 1940 painting 'Scene at the Signing of the Constitution of the United States'. The oil painting depicts the interior of a hall in warm brown and gold tones, with a large brass chandelier overhead and tall draped windows. A man stands at right on a raised dais beside an American flag, facing several dozen men in 18th-century dress (coats, breeches, white stockings); one man is seated centrally in the foreground while groups of men stand around green-cloth-covered tables. There is no overlaid text, slogan, or agency seal on the image.
notable_text: (no on-image text; tweet caption: 'Happy Constitution Day, Patriots!')
